zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强结构延续
zh.content:
AVAX短线维持震荡上行结构，价格重回6.6附近后动能略有放缓，但整体仍处于均线之上，多头优势未破坏短期结构偏强运行但需警惕回调风险

技术指标方面，MACD为正值0.09附近，动能柱温和扩张，暗示多头延续但缺乏强趋势；RSI未给出但预计处于中性偏强区间结构中性偏多

下方支撑关注6.54与6.43一带，若失守可能回测6.20区域；上方阻力位于6.63及前高6.70附近，突破需放量确认。

操作上建议维持低吸高抛思路，回踩6.54上方可分批布局，多单止损设于6.43下方，短线快进快出为主控制风险关注成交量确认

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
is showing a mild short-term recovery bias after consolidating above the 20-period SMA. Price action at 6.6006 remains slightly above the recent intraday range midpoint, suggesting buyers are gradually defending higher lows. The 24-hour structure indicates a tight range between 6.5425 and 6.6349, reflecting equilibrium rather than trend expansion. Overall momentum is cautiously positive, but conviction remains limited without a decisive breakout above recent highs.

MACD reading at 0.0914 suggests early bullish momentum, although the absence of a confirmed signal line limits reliability. Price trading above the SMA(20) at 6.43703 reinforces a short-term bullish structure, indicating buyers still control the trend. However, lack of RSI data reduces overbought/oversold clarity, meaning momentum strength cannot be fully validated. Overall, indicators point to cautious upside continuation rather than an aggressive breakout phase.

Immediate resistance is located near 6.6349, aligning with the 24-hour high and acting as the first barrier for continuation. A sustained break above this level could open a path toward the 6.70 psychological zone. On the downside, initial support sits at 6.5425, with stronger structural support around the SMA(20) at 6.43703. This creates a well-defined compression range between support and resistance.

Trading conditions favor a range-bound strategy in the short term, with emphasis on buying near support and reducing exposure near resistance. Aggressive traders may consider long positions on a confirmed breakout above 6.6349 with volume confirmation. Conversely, failure to hold 6.5425 could trigger short-term downside pressure toward 6.4370. Risk management remains essential due to low volatility and unclear directional momentum.
